confidence_proof.formula: path_confidence = round(100 × (w_infra × infra_mean + w_exploit × exploit_mean) × verified_boost × tier_factor)
explanation: path_confidence = round(100 × (w_infra × infra_mean + w_exploit × exploit_mean) × verified_boost × tier_factor)

risk_proof.formula: risk = min(10, cvss_base × maturity_factor × access_factor × auth_factor × evidence_factor × blast_factor × privilege_factor × business_criticality × data_sensitivity × identity_impact × lateral_movement × persistence)
explanation: cvss_base=8.50 (cvss=9.3), maturity=weaponized (1.00), access=remote (1.05), auth=none (1.00), evidence=88% (0.97), blast=0 (1.00), privilege=1.00 (unknown); risk = 8.50 × 1.00 × 1.05 × 1.00 × 0.97 × 1.00 × 1.00 = 8.6
